columns.name: kontraktType
columns.description: Type of contract, referenced from DBM.KD_KONTRAKT_TYPE

columns.name: anleggNr
columns.description: Number of the installation or facility

columns.name: slag
columns.description: Type or category, possibly related to product type

columns.name: okologisk
columns.description: Indicator for organic product, where J=Yes and N=No (conventional corn)

columns.name: forMat
columns.description: Indicator for food or material use, where F=Food, M=Materiel, B=Both

columns.name: fraDato
columns.description: Start date of the pricing rule

columns.name: tilDato
columns.description: End date of the pricing rule

columns.name: brukerId
columns.description: Identifier for the user or customer

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: Timestamp of when the record was created or last updated

columns.name: etterbetaling
columns.description: Indicator for after payment, where J=Yes and N=No

columns.name: spesialkontrakt
columns.description: Indicator for special contract, where J=Yes and N=No

columns.name: tekst
columns.description: Text to be printed on billing invoices or documents

columns.name: basisPrebasis
columns.description: Indicator for basis prebasis, where J=Yes and allows for alternative analysis price
